# contextweaver public API manifest (generated by scripts/gen_api_manifest.py)
# Drift here means the public surface changed — review the diff deliberately.

      def add_edge(self, src: 'str', dst: 'str') -> 'None'
      def add_item(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'None'
      def add_node(self, node_id: 'str', label: 'str' = '', routing_hint: 'str' = '') -> 'None'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ChoiceGraph'
      def get_node(self, node_id: 'str') -> 'ChoiceNode'

      def search(self, query: 'str', top_k: 'int') -> 'list[tuple[int, float]]'
  class RouteError(ContextWeaverError)(...)
  class RouteHistory(called_tool_ids: 'list[str]' = <factory>, last_result_summary: 'str | None' = None, step_number: 'int' = 1, repeat_penalty: 'float' = 0.5, result_boost_weight: 'float' = 0.3) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'RouteHistory'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class RouteResult(candidate_items: 'list[SelectableItem]' = <factory>, candidate_ids: 'list[str]' = <factory>, paths: 'list[list[str]]' = <factory>, scores: 'list[float]' = <factory>, is_ambiguous: 'bool' = False, clarifying_question: 'str | None' = None, excluded_count: 'int' = 0, gated_count: 'int' = 0, context_hints: 'list[str]' = <factory>, context_boost_applied: 'bool' = False, history_adjustments: 'dict[str, float]' = <factory>, trace: 'RouteTrace' = <factory>) -> None
      def explanation(self, format: "Literal['md', 'dict']" = 'md') -> 'str | dict[str, Any]'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'RouteResult'
      def to_dict(self, *, include_items: 'bool' = True) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def to_routing_decision(self, *, decision_id: 'str | None' = None, selected_item_id: 'str | None' = None, selected_card_id: 'str | None' = None, context_summary: 'str | None' = None, now: 'datetime | None' = None, metadata: 'dict[str, Any] | None' = None) -> 'RoutingDecision'
  class RouteTrace(trace_version: 'int' = 1, query: 'str' = '', confidence_gap: 'float' = 0.0, top_score: 'float' = 0.0, runner_up_score: 'float | None' = None, is_ambiguous: 'bool' = False, excluded_count: 'int' = 0, gated_count: 'int' = 0, retriever_engine: 'str' = 'tfidf', steps: 'list[TraceStep]' = <factory>, clarifying_question: 'str | None' = None, extra: 'dict[str, Any]' = <factory>) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'RouteTrace'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def to_legacy_dicts(self) -> 'list[dict[str, Any]]'
  class Router(graph: 'ChoiceGraph', items: 'list[SelectableItem] | None' = None, scorer: '_ScorerLike | None' = None, beam_width: 'int' = 2, max_depth: 'int' = 8, top_k: 'int' = 10, confidence_gap: 'float' = 0.15, *, scorer_backend: 'str' = 'tfidf', routing_config: 'RoutingConfig | None' = None, retriever: 'Retriever | None' = None, engine_registry: 'EngineRegistry | None' = None, embedding_backend: 'EmbeddingBackend | None' = None, pipeline: 'RoutingPipeline | None' = None, score_provider: 'RoutingScoreProvider | None' = None) -> 'None'
      def route(self, query: 'str', *, debug: 'bool' = False, exclude_ids: 'set[str] | None' = None, exclude_tags: 'set[str] | None' = None, allowed_namespaces: 'set[str] | None' = None, allowed_tags: 'set[str] | None' = None, context_hints: 'list[str] | None' = None, history: 'RouteHistory | None' = None) -> 'RouteResult'
      def set_items(self, items: 'list[SelectableItem]') -> 'None'
  class RoutingConfig(beam_width: 'int' = 2, max_depth: 'int' = 8, top_k: 'int' = 10, confidence_gap: 'float' = 0.15, max_children: 'int' = 20) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'RoutingConfig'
      def routing_kwargs(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class RoutingDecision(id: 'str', choice_cards: 'list[ChoiceCard]', timestamp: 'datetime', selected_item_id: 'str | None' = None, selected_card_id: 'str | None' = None, context_summary: 'str | None' = None, metadata: 'dict[str, Any]' = <factory>) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'RoutingDecision'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class RoutingPipeline(retriever: 'Retriever', reranker: 'Reranker | None' = None, navigator: 'Navigator | None' = None, packer: 'CardPacker' = <factory>) -> None
      def from_config(cls, config: 'RoutingConfig | None' = None, *, registry: 'EngineRegistry | None' = None) -> 'RoutingPipeline'
      def navigate(self, query: 'str', graph: 'ChoiceGraph', active_items: 'dict[str, SelectableItem]', doc_id_to_idx: 'dict[str, int]', *, all_item_ids: 'set[str] | None' = None, debug: 'bool' = False) -> 'NavigationResult'
      def pack(self, items: 'list[SelectableItem]', scores: 'dict[str, float]', *, budget_tokens: 'int | None' = None) -> 'list[ChoiceCard]'
      def rerank(self, query: 'str', candidates: 'list[tuple[str, float]]') -> 'list[tuple[str, float]]'
  class RoutingScoreProvider(Protocol)(*args, **kwargs)
      def adjust(self, query: 'str', scored: 'list[tuple[str, float]]') -> 'list[tuple[str, float]]'
  class RuleBasedSummarizer(max_chars: 'int' = 500) -> 'None'
      def summarize(self, raw: 'str', metadata: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'
  class ScoringConfig(recency_weight: 'float' = 0.3, tag_match_weight: 'float' = 0.25, kind_priority_weight: 'float' = 0.35, token_cost_penalty: 'float' = 0.1, dedup_threshold: 'float' = 0.85) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ScoringConfig'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class SecretRedactor(mask: 'str' = '[REDACTED-SECRET]', estimator: 'TokenEstimator | None' = None) -> 'None'
      def redact(self, item: 'ContextItem') -> 'ContextItem'

      def all(self) -> 'list[ContextItem]'

      def children(self, parent_id: 'str') -> 'list[ContextItem]'

      def tail(self, n: 'int') -> 'list[ContextItem]'

      def summarize(self, raw: 'str', metadata: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'

      def estimate(self, text: 'str') -> 'int'

      def clear_cache(self) -> 'None'
  class ViewRegistry() -> 'None'
      def generate_views(self, ref: 'ArtifactRef', data: 'bytes') -> 'list[ViewSpec]'

  def compute_catalog_hash(items: 'list[SelectableItem]') -> 'str'
  config: module
  default_registry: EngineRegistry
  def detect_sensitivity(text: 'str') -> 'Sensitivity'
  diagnostics: module
  def drilldown_tool_spec() -> 'SelectableItem'
  envelope: module
  exceptions: module

  inspection: module

  def load_diagnostic_events(path: 'str | Path') -> 'list[DiagnosticEvent]'
  def make_choice_cards(items: 'list[SelectableItem]', *, max_cards: 'int' = 20, target_tokens_per_card: 'int' = 60, hard_cap_tokens_per_card: 'int' = 80, scores: 'dict[str, float] | None' = None, redact_secrets: 'bool' = False) -> 'list[ChoiceCard]'

  tokens: module

## contextweaver.adapters
  class CatalogRefreshReport(registered: 'int' = 0, skipped: 'list[SkippedTool]' = <factory>, schema_findings: 'list[SchemaFinding]' = <factory>) -> None
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class DryRunReport(tool_id: 'str', upstream_name: 'str', args_valid: 'bool', annotations: 'dict[str, Any]' = <factory>, checks: 'list[dict[str, str]]' = <factory>) -> None
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class ExposureMode(str, Enum)(value, names=None, *, module=None, qualname=None, type=None, start=1, boundary=None)
  GATEWAY_TOOL_NAMES: tuple
  class GatewayError(code: 'GatewayErrorCode', message: 'str', path: 'str' = '', retryable: 'bool' = False, details: 'dict[str, Any]' = <factory>) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'GatewayError'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class McpClientUpstream(session: 'Any', *, timeout: 'float | None' = 30.0) -> 'None'
      def call_tool(self, tool_name: 'str', arguments: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def list_tools(self) -> 'list[dict[str, Any]]'
  class MultiplexUpstream(sources: 'list[Any]') -> 'None'
      def call_tool(self, tool_name: 'str', arguments: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def list_tools(self) -> 'list[dict[str, Any]]'
  PROXY_META_TOOL_NAMES: tuple
  class ProxyRuntime(upstream: 'UpstreamCall', *, mode: 'ExposureMode' = <ExposureMode.GATEWAY: 'gateway'>, context_manager: 'ContextManager | None' = None, tree_builder: 'TreeBuilder | None' = None, beam_width: 'int' = 3, top_k: 'int' = 10, cache_stable: 'bool' = False, diagnostic_sink: 'DiagnosticSink | None' = None, session_id: 'str | None' = None, redact_secrets: 'bool' = False, on_invalid: "Literal['skip', 'raise']" = 'skip', schema_limits: 'SchemaLimits | None' = None, tolerant_args: 'bool' = False, retry_policy: 'RetryPolicy | None' = None, rate_limiter: 'RateLimiter | None' = None, result_cache: 'ToolResultCache | None' = None, retry_sleep: 'Sleeper | None' = None, jitter_source: 'Callable[[], float] | None' = None) -> 'None'
      def browse(self, *, query: 'str | None' = None, path: 'str | None' = None, top_k: 'int | None' = None) -> 'list[ChoiceCard] | GatewayError'
      def execute(self, tool_id: 'str', args: 'dict[str, Any]', *, dry_run: 'bool' = False) -> 'ResultEnvelope | GatewayError | DryRunReport'
      def hydrate(self, tool_id: 'str') -> 'HydrationResult | GatewayError'
      def list_tool_ids(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def refresh_catalog(self) -> 'int'
      def register_tool_defs_sync(self, tool_defs: 'list[dict[str, Any]]') -> 'int'
      def strip_tools_list(self) -> 'list[dict[str, Any]]'
      def view(self, handle: 'str', selector: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str | GatewayError'
  class RateLimit(max_calls_per_minute: 'int | None' = None, max_calls_per_session: 'int | None' = None) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'RateLimit'

      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'RateLimitPolicy'

  class Repair(path: 'str', rule: 'str') -> None
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, str]'

  def load_a2a_session_jsonl(path: 'str | Path') -> 'list[ContextItem]'

  def load_chainweaver_export(export: 'list[dict[str, Any]] | dict[str, Any]', *, namespace: 'str | None' = None) -> 'Catalog'
  def load_crewai_catalog(tools: 'list[object]', *, namespace: 'str | None' = None) -> 'Catalog'
  def load_fastmcp_catalog(source: 'object', *, namespace: 'str | None' = None) -> 'Catalog'
  def load_mcp_session_jsonl(path: 'str | Path') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
  def load_pydantic_ai_catalog(tools: 'list[object]', *, namespace: 'str | None' = None) -> 'Catalog'
  def load_smolagents_catalog(tools: 'list[object]', *, namespace: 'str | None' = None) -> 'Catalog'
  def make_context_hook(context_manager: 'ContextManager', *, firewall_threshold: 'int' = 2000, tool_name: 'str' = 'codemode.tool_result') -> 'Callable[[str, str], str]'
  def make_discovery_tool(router: 'Router', catalog: 'Catalog', *, top_k: 'int | None' = None) -> 'Callable[[str], list[dict[str, Any]]]'
  def make_gateway_meta_tools(runtime: 'ProxyRuntime') -> 'list[dict[str, Any]]'
  def make_proxy_meta_tools(runtime: 'ProxyRuntime') -> 'list[dict[str, Any]]'
  def make_stripped_tools_list(runtime: 'ProxyRuntime') -> 'list[dict[str, Any]]'

  def mcp_tool_to_selectable(tool_def: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'SelectableItem'
  def normalize_args(args: 'object', schema: 'dict[str, Any] | None') -> 'tuple[Any, list[Repair]]'
  def pydantic_ai_tool_to_selectable(tool_def: 'dict[str, Any]', *, namespace: 'str | None' = None) -> 'SelectableItem'
  def pydantic_ai_tools_to_catalog(tools: 'list[dict[str, Any]]', *, namespace: 'str | None' = None) -> 'Catalog'
  def redact_upstream_detail(text: 'str', *, max_len: 'int' = 256) -> 'str'
  def selectable_from_agno_tool(tool_def: 'dict[str, Any]', *, namespace: 'str | None' = None) -> 'SelectableItem'
  def selectable_from_pydantic_tool(tool_def: 'dict[str, Any]', *, namespace: 'str | None' = None) -> 'SelectableItem'

  def smolagents_tools_to_catalog(tools: 'list[dict[str, Any]]', *, namespace: 'str | None' = None) -> 'Catalog'

  def to_gemini_contents(items: 'list[ContextItem]') -> 'list[dict[str, Any]]'
  def to_openai_messages(items: 'list[ContextItem]') -> 'list[dict[str, Any]]'
  def to_pydantic_ai_messages(items: 'list[ContextItem]') -> 'list[dict[str, Any]]'

  def to_weaver_choice_cards(cards: 'list[ChoiceCard]', *, menu_id: 'str', context_hint: 'str | None' = None) -> '_ws_types.ChoiceCard'

  def to_weaver_routing_decision(decision: 'RoutingDecision') -> '_ws_types.RoutingDecision'
  def to_weaver_selectable_item(item: 'SelectableItem') -> '_ws_types.SelectableItem'

## contextweaver.context
  class CandidateExplanation(item_id: 'str', kind: 'str', sensitivity: 'str', score: 'float | None' = None, included: 'bool' = False, drop_reason: 'str' = '', dependency_closure: 'bool' = False) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'CandidateExplanation'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class ContextBuildExplanation(version: 'int' = 1, phase: 'str' = 'answer', query: 'str' = '', total_candidates: 'int' = 0, included_count: 'int' = 0, dropped_count: 'int' = 0, dropped_reasons: 'dict[str, int]' = <factory>, dependency_closures: 'int' = 0, sensitivity_drops: 'int' = 0, dedup_removed: 'int' = 0, budget_tokens: 'int' = 0, candidates: 'list[CandidateExplanation]' = <factory>) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ContextBuildExplanation'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'

      def drilldown(self, handle: 'str', selector: 'dict[str, Any]', *, inject: 'bool' = False, parent_id: 'str | None' = None) -> 'str'
      def drilldown_sync(self, handle: 'str', selector: 'dict[str, Any]', *, inject: 'bool' = False, parent_id: 'str | None' = None) -> 'str'
  EXPLANATION_VERSION: int
  HANDOFF_CATEGORIES: tuple

## contextweaver.eval
  class ContextEvalReport(phase: 'str' = 'answer', prompt_tokens: 'int' = 0, budget_tokens: 'int' = 0, budget_utilization_pct: 'float' = 0.0, naive_tokens: 'int' = 0, token_savings: 'int' = 0, token_savings_pct: 'float' = 0.0, total_candidates: 'int' = 0, items_included: 'int' = 0, items_dropped: 'int' = 0, dedup_removed: 'int' = 0) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ContextEvalReport'
      def summary(self) -> 'str'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'

      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'EvalCase'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'

      def load(cls, path: 'str | Path') -> 'EvalDataset'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'

      def summary(self) -> 'str'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'

## contextweaver.routing
  class Catalog() -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[SelectableItem]'
      def filter_by_namespace(self, namespace: 'str') -> 'list[SelectableItem]'
      def filter_by_tags(self, *tags: 'str') -> 'list[SelectableItem]'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'Catalog'
      def get(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'SelectableItem'
      def hydrate(self, tool_id: 'str') -> 'HydrationResult'
      def register(self, item: 'SelectableItem') -> 'None'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def validate_dependencies(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def validate_references(self) -> 'CatalogValidationReport'
  class CatalogNormalizer(*, strict: 'bool' = False, lowercase_tags: 'bool' = True) -> 'None'
      def normalize(self, items: 'list[SelectableItem]') -> 'tuple[list[SelectableItem], NormalizationReport]'
  class CatalogValidationReport(items_processed: 'int' = 0, findings: 'list[ReferenceFinding]' = <factory>) -> None
      def messages(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class ChoiceGraph(max_children: 'int' = 20) -> 'None'
      def add_edge(self, src: 'str', dst: 'str') -> 'None'
      def add_item(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'None'
      def add_node(self, node_id: 'str', label: 'str' = '', routing_hint: 'str' = '') -> 'None'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ChoiceGraph'
      def get_node(self, node_id: 'str') -> 'ChoiceNode'
      def items(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def nodes(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def predecessors(self, node_id: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
      def roots(self) -> 'list[str]'
      def stats(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def successors(self, node_id: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
      def topological_order(self) -> 'list[str]'
  class ChoiceNode(node_id: 'str', label: 'str' = '', routing_hint: 'str' = '', children: 'list[str]' = <factory>, child_types: 'dict[str, str]' = <factory>, stats: 'dict[str, Any]' = <factory>) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ChoiceNode'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  DEFAULT_CARD_HARD_CAP_TOKENS: int
  DEFAULT_CARD_TARGET_TOKENS: int
  class DeterministicScoreProvider()
      def adjust(self, query: 'str', scored: 'list[tuple[str, float]]') -> 'list[tuple[str, float]]'
  class ExecutionFeedback(item_id: 'str', success: 'bool' = True, latency_ms: 'float | None' = None, token_cost: 'int | None' = None, quality_score: 'float | None' = None, timestamp: 'datetime | None' = None, metadata: 'dict[str, Any]' = <factory>) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ExecutionFeedback'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'

      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, str]'
  class RouteResult(candidate_items: 'list[SelectableItem]' = <factory>, candidate_ids: 'list[str]' = <factory>, paths: 'list[list[str]]' = <factory>, scores: 'list[float]' = <factory>, is_ambiguous: 'bool' = False, clarifying_question: 'str | None' = None, excluded_count: 'int' = 0, gated_count: 'int' = 0, context_hints: 'list[str]' = <factory>, context_boost_applied: 'bool' = False, history_adjustments: 'dict[str, float]' = <factory>, trace: 'RouteTrace' = <factory>) -> None

      def to_dict(self, *, include_items: 'bool' = True) -> 'dict[str, Any]'

  class Router(graph: 'ChoiceGraph', items: 'list[SelectableItem] | None' = None, scorer: '_ScorerLike | None' = None, beam_width: 'int' = 2, max_depth: 'int' = 8, top_k: 'int' = 10, confidence_gap: 'float' = 0.15, *, scorer_backend: 'str' = 'tfidf', routing_config: 'RoutingConfig | None' = None, retriever: 'Retriever | None' = None, engine_registry: 'EngineRegistry | None' = None, embedding_backend: 'EmbeddingBackend | None' = None, pipeline: 'RoutingPipeline | None' = None, score_provider: 'RoutingScoreProvider | None' = None) -> 'None'
      def route(self, query: 'str', *, debug: 'bool' = False, exclude_ids: 'set[str] | None' = None, exclude_tags: 'set[str] | None' = None, allowed_namespaces: 'set[str] | None' = None, allowed_tags: 'set[str] | None' = None, context_hints: 'list[str] | None' = None, history: 'RouteHistory | None' = None) -> 'RouteResult'
      def set_items(self, items: 'list[SelectableItem]') -> 'None'
  class SchemaSource(schemas: 'Mapping[str, dict[str, Any]] | None' = None) -> 'None'
      def from_json_file(cls, path: 'str | Path') -> 'SchemaSource'

      def known_ids(self) -> 'list[str]'

  class TreeBuilder(max_children: 'int' = 20, labeler: 'KeywordLabeler | None' = None, target_group_size: 'int | None' = None, *, routing_config: 'RoutingConfig | None' = None, clustering: 'ClusteringEngine | None' = None, engine_registry: 'EngineRegistry | None' = None) -> 'None'

      def clear_cache(self) -> 'None'
  def aggregate_feedback(entries: 'Iterable[ExecutionFeedback]') -> 'dict[str, ExecutionFeedback]'
  def bound_browse_response(cards: 'list[ChoiceCard]', *, target_tokens_per_card: 'int' = 60, hard_cap_tokens_per_card: 'int' = 80, preamble_tokens: 'int' = 32) -> 'list[ChoiceCard]'
  def canonical_tool_id(*, namespace: 'str', name: 'str', upstream_name: 'str', input_schema: 'dict[str, Any] | None', version: 'str | None' = None) -> 'str'
  def cards_for_route(route: 'list[str]', catalog: 'Catalog', *, redact_secrets: 'bool' = False) -> 'list[ChoiceCard]'

  def count_tokens(text: 'str') -> 'int'
  def format_card_for_prompt(card: 'ChoiceCard') -> 'str'
  def format_tool_id(parts: 'ToolIdParts') -> 'str'

  def item_to_card(item: 'SelectableItem', *, score: 'float | None' = None, redact_secrets: 'bool' = False) -> 'ChoiceCard'
  def lazy_schema_resolver(catalog: 'Catalog', source: 'SchemaSource | Mapping[str, dict[str, Any]] | None' = None) -> '_LazyResolver'
  def load_graph(path: 'str | Path') -> 'ChoiceGraph'

  def parse_path(path: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
  def parse_tool_id(s: 'str') -> 'ToolIdParts'

  def truncate_description_to_tokens(text: 'str', max_tokens: 'int') -> 'str'

## contextweaver.store
  class InMemoryArtifactStore() -> 'None'
      def delete(self, handle: 'str') -> 'None'
      def drilldown(self, handle: 'str', selector: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'
      def exists(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bool'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'InMemoryArtifactStore'
      def get(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bytes'
      def list_refs(self) -> 'list[ArtifactRef]'
      def metadata(self, handle: 'str') -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def put(self, handle: 'str', content: 'bytes', media_type: 'str' = 'application/octet-stream', label: 'str' = '') -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def ref(self, handle: 'str') -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class InMemoryEpisodicStore() -> 'None'
      def add(self, episode: 'Episode') -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[Episode]'
      def delete(self, episode_id: 'str') -> 'None'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'InMemoryEpisodicStore'
      def get(self, episode_id: 'str') -> 'Episode | None'
      def latest(self, n: 'int' = 3) -> 'list[tuple[str, str, dict[str, Any]]]'
      def search(self, query: 'str', top_k: 'int' = 5) -> 'list[Episode]'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class InMemoryEventLog() -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def append(self, item: 'ContextItem') -> 'None'
      def children(self, parent_id: 'str') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def close(self) -> 'None'
      def count(self) -> 'int'
      def filter_by_kind(self, *kinds: 'ItemKind') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'InMemoryEventLog'
      def get(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'ContextItem'
      def parent(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'ContextItem | None'
      def query(self, kinds: 'list[ItemKind] | None' = None, since: 'int | None' = None, limit: 'int | None' = None) -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def tail(self, n: 'int') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class InMemoryFactStore() -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[Fact]'
      def delete(self, fact_id: 'str') -> 'None'
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'InMemoryFactStore'
      def get(self, fact_id: 'str') -> 'Fact'
      def get_by_key(self, key: 'str') -> 'list[Fact]'
      def list_keys(self, prefix: 'str' = '') -> 'list[str]'
      def put(self, fact: 'Fact') -> 'None'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  class JsonFileArtifactStore(base_dir: 'str | Path', *, max_bytes: 'int | None' = None, max_artifacts: 'int | None' = None) -> 'None'
      def delete(self, handle: 'str') -> 'None'
      def drilldown(self, handle: 'str', selector: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'
      def exists(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bool'
      def get(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bytes'
      def list_refs(self) -> 'list[ArtifactRef]'
      def metadata(self, handle: 'str') -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def put(self, handle: 'str', content: 'bytes', media_type: 'str' = 'application/octet-stream', label: 'str' = '') -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def ref(self, handle: 'str') -> 'ArtifactRef'
  class RedisArtifactStore(client: 'redis.Redis | None' = None, *, url: 'str | None' = None, namespace: 'str' = 'cw', ttl_seconds: 'int | None' = None) -> 'None'
      def delete(self, handle: 'str') -> 'None'
      def drilldown(self, handle: 'str', selector: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'
      def exists(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bool'
      def get(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bytes'
      def list_refs(self) -> 'list[ArtifactRef]'
      def metadata(self, handle: 'str') -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def put(self, handle: 'str', content: 'bytes', media_type: 'str' = 'application/octet-stream', label: 'str' = '') -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def ref(self, handle: 'str') -> 'ArtifactRef'
  class RedisEventLog(client: 'redis.Redis | None' = None, *, url: 'str | None' = None, namespace: 'str' = 'cw') -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def append(self, item: 'ContextItem') -> 'None'
      def children(self, parent_id: 'str') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def close(self) -> 'None'
      def count(self) -> 'int'
      def filter_by_kind(self, *kinds: 'ItemKind') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def get(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'ContextItem'
      def parent(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'ContextItem | None'
      def query(self, kinds: 'list[ItemKind] | None' = None, since: 'int | None' = None, limit: 'int | None' = None) -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def tail(self, n: 'int') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
  class S3ArtifactStore(bucket: 'str', *, client: 'Any | None' = None, prefix: 'str' = 'artifacts', endpoint_url: 'str | None' = None, region_name: 'str | None' = None) -> 'None'
      def delete(self, handle: 'str') -> 'None'
      def drilldown(self, handle: 'str', selector: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'
      def exists(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bool'
      def get(self, handle: 'str') -> 'bytes'
      def list_refs(self) -> 'list[ArtifactRef]'
      def metadata(self, handle: 'str') -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def put(self, handle: 'str', content: 'bytes', media_type: 'str' = 'application/octet-stream', label: 'str' = '') -> 'ArtifactRef'
      def ref(self, handle: 'str') -> 'ArtifactRef'
  class SqliteEpisodicStore(path: 'str | Path') -> 'None'
      def add(self, episode: 'Episode') -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[Episode]'
      def close(self) -> 'None'
      def delete(self, episode_id: 'str') -> 'None'
      def get(self, episode_id: 'str') -> 'Episode | None'
      def latest(self, n: 'int' = 3) -> 'list[tuple[str, str, dict[str, Any]]]'
      def search(self, query: 'str', top_k: 'int' = 5) -> 'list[Episode]'
  class SqliteEventLog(path: 'str | Path') -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def append(self, item: 'ContextItem') -> 'None'
      def children(self, parent_id: 'str') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def close(self) -> 'None'
      def count(self) -> 'int'
      def filter_by_kind(self, *kinds: 'ItemKind') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def get(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'ContextItem'
      def parent(self, item_id: 'str') -> 'ContextItem | None'
      def query(self, kinds: 'list[ItemKind] | None' = None, since: 'int | None' = None, limit: 'int | None' = None) -> 'list[ContextItem]'
      def tail(self, n: 'int') -> 'list[ContextItem]'
  class SqliteFactStore(path: 'str | Path') -> 'None'
      def all(self) -> 'list[Fact]'
      def close(self) -> 'None'
      def delete(self, fact_id: 'str') -> 'None'
      def get(self, fact_id: 'str') -> 'Fact'
      def get_by_key(self, key: 'str') -> 'list[Fact]'
      def list_keys(self, prefix: 'str' = '') -> 'list[str]'
      def put(self, fact: 'Fact') -> 'None'
  class StoreBundle(artifact_store: 'ArtifactStore | None' = None, event_log: 'EventLog | None' = None, episodic_store: 'EpisodicStore | None' = None, fact_store: 'FactStore | None' = None) -> None
      def from_dict(cls, data: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'StoreBundle'
      def to_dict(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
  def is_async_store(store: 'object') -> 'bool'
  def to_async(store: 'EventLog | ArtifactStore | EpisodicStore | FactStore') -> 'AsyncEventLog | AsyncArtifactStore | AsyncEpisodicStore | AsyncFactStore'
  def to_sync(store: 'AsyncEventLog | AsyncArtifactStore | AsyncEpisodicStore | AsyncFactStore', loop: '_LoopThread') -> 'EventLog | ArtifactStore | EpisodicStore | FactStore'

## contextweaver.summarize
  class RuleBasedSummarizer(max_chars: 'int' = 500) -> 'None'
      def summarize(self, raw: 'str', metadata: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'
  class RuleEngine(rules: 'list[SummarizationRule] | None' = None) -> 'None'
      def add_rule(self, rule: 'SummarizationRule') -> 'None'
      def all_rules(self) -> 'list[SummarizationRule]'
      def resolve(self, media_type: 'str', metadata: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'str'
  class StructuredExtractor(max_chars: 'int' = 500) -> 'None'
      def extract(self, raw: 'str', metadata: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'list[str]'
  class StructuredFirewall(keep: 'list[str]' = <factory>, max_fact_chars: 'int' = 500) -> None
      def compact(self, data: 'Any') -> 'tuple[Any, list[str]]'
  class SummarizationRule(media_type_prefix: 'str' = '', required_tags: 'list[str]' = <factory>, summarizer_name: 'str' = 'default', priority: 'int' = 0) -> None
      def matches(self, media_type: 'str', metadata: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'bool'
  def extract_bullet_list(text: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
  def extract_facts(text: 'str', metadata: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'list[str]'
  def extract_key_value_pairs(text: 'str') -> 'dict[str, str]'
  def extract_numbered_list(text: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
  def parse_path(path: 'str') -> 'list[str]'
  def project(obj: 'Any', keep: 'list[str]') -> 'Any'
